# Assumption Ledger

| ID | Assumption | Risk if wrong | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| A-001 | Local commits at green gate boundaries; never push | unwanted history | confirmed by request |
| A-002 | macOS/Linux are release targets; Windows unsupported | reduced portability | confirmed by plan |
| A-003 | Default panel is Claude/Codex/Agy from the plan | unavailable default | still-assumed |
| A-004 | 128k context and 16k reserve are conservative defaults | unnecessary splitting | still-assumed |
| A-005 | Decision memory remains external unless exported | portability requires action | confirmed by plan |
| A-006 | DOCX/PDF are review-only | users may expect binary editing | confirmed by plan |
| A-007 | Generic web search needs trusted endpoint config | less zero-config coverage | confirmed by plan |
